titleStmt.title: SII 34.41: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 41. Tiruppanandāḷ, Kumbakonam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the north wall of the first prākāra of the Arjunajaṭēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman Kulōttuṅga III, 9th year, Rhishabha, badi 10, Monday, Pūrva-bhādrapada. = A.D. 1187, May 4, Monday.

Unfinished. Gift of land to the temple by the mahāsabhā of Tirupparandāḻ, a brahmadēya in Maṇṇi-nāḍu in Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu for the use of the goddess Tirukkāmakkōṭṭamuḍaiya-Periyanāchchiyār. Some part of the gift land was set apart for the path to a crematorium (chuḍukāḍu) and for the purpose of the bathing of those visiting the crematorium.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī puyalvāyppa vaḷamperuka poyyāta nāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ceyalvāyppat tirumakaḷuñ jeyamakaḷuñ ciṟantuvāḻa veṇmatipOla kuṭaiviḷaṅka velvEntaraṭivaṇaṅka maṇmaṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa manunīti taḻaittOṅka cakkaramuñ ceṅkOlun tikkaṉaittuñcela naṭappa
kaṟpakāram puvikākkap poṟpamainta muṭipuṉaintu vēṇṭaviṭṭa taṇṭāl vīrapāṇṭiyaṉ makaṉ paṭamē mukappaṭac ciṅkaḷappaṭai mūkkaṟupuṇ ṭalai kaṭalpuka vīrapāṇṭiyaṉ mutukiṭumpaṭi tākki maturaiyum Araicuṅ koṇṭu jayattampam naṭṭataṟpiṉ Ammaturaiyum Araicum nāṭum
Aṭainta pāṇṭiyaṟkaruḷi meymalanta tiyākakkoṭiyōṭu vīrakkoṭi yeṭuttuc cempoṉ vīraciṅṅāsaṉattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kōpparakēcari paṟmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravaṟti maturaikoṇṭu Aruḷiṉa śrīkulōttuṅkacōḻa tēvaṟku yāṇṭu Oṉpatāvatu Iṣapanāya
ṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tecamiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūraṭṭāti nāḷ virutarājapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭup pirammatēyam tirupparantāḷ mahāsabhaiyōm Iṉnāṭṭu Uṭaiyārt tiruttāṭakaiīśvaramuṭaiyār kōyil tirukkāmakkōṭṭamuṭaiya periyanācciyār kaṉmikaḷ Āticaṇṭēcura tēvarkaṉmikaḷukku nāṅkaḷ
taṉmatāṉappiramāṇa Icaivutīṭṭup pirammatēyam tirupparantāḷ Iruṉūṟṟuppatiṉaṟuva vatikkum mēṟku cuntaracōḻa vāykkālukku vaṭakku Iraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟum mūṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟum kalampucukkuḷameṉṟu pēr kūvappaṭṭa Ūṟpaṭi taramilinilamarai Iṉ nilam Araiyiṉāl virittu nilam Araiyē Irumāvarai mun
tirikaikku kīḻpāṟ kellai Irājēntiracōḻa nallūr Ellaiyākavum teṉpāṟkellai piramma tēyam tirupparantāḷum Irājentira cōḻa nallūr Ellaiyākavum mēṟpāṟ kellai Irājentira cōḻa nallūr Ellaiyākavum vaṭapāṟ kellai pirammatēyam tirupparantāḷ cuṭukāṭu Irājēntiracōḻa nallūr Ellaiyākavum Āka Iv
vicainta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Arai Araiyiṉāl virittu nilam Araiyē Irumāvarai muntirikai Itil teṟkaṭaya mēṟpaṭṭu maraṅkaḷum cuṭukāṭṭukkup pōka vaḻiyum cuṭukāṭṭukkup pōṉāṉ kuḷikkavu nilam Iraṇṭumā nīkki nilam Araiyē Araimā muntirikaiyiṉ Araiyē Araimā muntirikaiyum I
ttirukkāmak kōṭṭamuṭaiya periya nācciyār kaṉmikaḷ Āticaṇṭēcura tēvarkaṉmikaḷukkut taṉmatāṉam paṇṇit taṉmatāṉap piramāṇa Icaivu tīṭṭu kkuṭuttōm pirammatēyam tirupparantaāḷ mahāsapaiyōm Ittaṉma tāṉappiramāṇa Icaivu tīṭṭu Eḻutac capai Uḷḷiruntu paṇittār vācciyaṉ Āviṉ kaṉṟu keṅkātarapaṭṭaṉ paṇiyālum ka
yiṟṟiyaṉ Ūruṭaip perumāṉ tiruppaḷit tirumanampi paṇiyālum kavuṇiyaṉ ceruṭai vētiyaṉ tillai nāyakanampi paṇiyālum ceyiṟiyaṉ Ūruṭaipperumāḷ veṇkāṭu tēvar paṇiyālum ceyiṟṟiyaṉ cūriyatēvaṉ cīrāma paṭṭaṉ paṇiyālum vācciyaṉ cāvattaruku nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ paṇiyālum vācciyaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ Ūruṭaippē
rampalattāṭi nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ paṇiyālum vācciyaṉ Āṇṭa kō viṉāyakapaṭṭaṉ paṇiyālum māṭilaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ liṅṅēcurar paṇiyālumḥ—
Digital edition of SII 34.41 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
